task_completion.description: Access the chart for patient Robert Thompson and open the 'Routine health maintenance examination' encounter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NOSH ChartingSystem interface should display patient Robert Thompson's chart and indicate that the 'Routine health maintenance examination' encounter is active.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Physical Exam documentation section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form, tab, or text area specifically designated for 'Physical Exam' (or PE) should be visible and active on the screen.

task_completion.description: Document the General and HEENT findings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text fields or text area for the physical exam should contain the specified General findings (Well-developed, well-nourished, alert and oriented, in no acute distress) and HEENT findings (Normocephalic, atraumatic, pupils equal, round, reactive to light and accommodation, oropharynx clear without erythema or exudates).

task_completion.description: Document the Neck and Cardiovascular findings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text fields or text area for the physical exam should contain the specified Neck findings (Supple, no lymphadenopathy, no thyromegaly, no JVD) and Cardiovascular findings (Regular rate and rhythm, S1 and S2 normal, no murmurs, rubs, or gallops).

task_completion.description: Document the Lungs and Abdomen findings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text fields or text area for the physical exam should contain the specified Lungs findings (Clear to auscultation bilaterally, no wheezes, rales, or rhonchi) and Abdomen findings (Soft, non-tender, non-distended, normoactive bowel sounds, no hepatosplenomegaly).
A confirmation message of saving, or the encounter note summary displaying the newly entered physical exam findings, should be visible.

integrity.description: The agent used the NOSH web interface to document the findings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the NOSH ChartingSystem web application in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual EHR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The documentation should be entered into the NOSH ChartingSystem interface, not a separate text editor or a mock webpage.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI using database queries.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing SQL INSERT or UPDATE commands modifying the database directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Robert Thompson (DOB: 1958-07-22, PID: 99). Encounter: 'Routine health maintenance examination' (EID: 200). Provider: demo_provider. Expected findings to be documented: General: Well-developed, well-nourished, alert and oriented, in no acute distress; HEENT: Normocephalic, atraumatic, pupils equal, round, reactive to light and accommodation, oropharynx clear without erythema or exudates; Neck: Supple, no lymphadenopathy, no thyromegaly, no JVD; Cardiovascular: Regular rate and rhythm, S1 and S2 normal, no murmurs, rubs, or gallops; Lungs: Clear to auscultation bilaterally, no wheezes, rales, or rhonchi; Abdomen: Soft, non-tender, non-distended, normoactive bowel sounds, no hepatosplenomegaly. The software is NOSH ChartingSystem.
